name: insight-companion
description: Insight Companion MVP built with Node.js and Express.

scripts.dev: if [ -f .env ]; then node --watch --env-file=.env src/server.js; else node --watch src/server.js; fi
scripts.start: if [ -f .env ]; then node --env-file=.env src/server.js; else node src/server.js; fi
